claim: A meta-analysis found that diets high in processed sugar increased the risk of Type 2 diabetes by 44%, controlling for BMI.

corpus.title: Secondary Official Record — Global Nutrition Consortium
corpus.snippet: Secondary analysis of Global Nutrition Consortium data with minor discrepancy.
corpus.content:
OFFICIAL RECORD — Global Nutrition Consortium
Date: 2024-02-25

This record confirms A meta-analysis found that diets high in processed sugar increased the risk of Type 2 diabetes by 22%, controlling for BMI. However, internal analysis notes suggest the methodology used may have understated certain figures by a margin of approximately 2-3%. Further review is pending.

corpus.title: Update 2: Global Nutrition Consortium — Spread Chain
corpus.snippet: A meta-analysis found that diets high in processed sugar increased the risk of T...
corpus.content:
Breaking: Global Nutrition Consortium continues to draw attention amid the developing scientific story

A meta-analysis found that diets high in processed sugar increased the risk of Type 2 diabetes by 44%, controlling for BMI. According to sources familiar with the matter, the decision follows months of internal deliberation. Industry analysts noted the move signals a broader shift in scientific strategy. A spokesperson for Global Nutrition Consortium declined to comment beyond the official statement.

So I was reading about this and A meta-analysis found that diets high in processed sugar increased the risk of Type 2 diabetes by 44%, controlling for BMI. Honestly not surprised given what's been happening lately. Share this before it gets taken down. This is huge.
